summary.value: Software engineer with fullstack and quality engineering experience across healthcare systems, fintech infrastructure, and Web3 platforms — building production features, E2E test suites, and developer observability tooling. Proven track record of shipping reliably in cross-functional, distributed teams.

projects.name: Konseki
projects.details: Developer observability tool for reproducing UI bugs — built with Svelte, TypeScript, rrweb

projects.name: silicon-accelerometer-ts
projects.details: Small TypeScript API for accessing Macbook's accelerometer via C and Bun FFI

projects.name: Copilot-J
projects.details: LabLab Open Source AI Hackathon Submission. Open source Copilot alternative for VSCode with LocalAI.

projects.name: Grader for CE Boost Up 6
projects.details: Grader website for Freshmen in CE BOOST UP 6 Camp.

technologies.details: React/Next.js, Svelte, Nest.js, Fastify, TailwindCSS, RxJS
SQL Database (Postgres, MsSQL), MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, InfluxDB
Git, Docker, Kubernetes, testcontainers, Playwright, Appium, k6, Optimizely, Google Analytics, Amplitude, Hotjar, Datadog
GCP, Firebase, Supabase, GitHub Actions, Ethereum dApp development, FHIR/EHR health informatics

workExperiences.companyDescription:
U.S.-based fintech startup with 4M+ users
(Laid off due to company restructuring)
details: Built and maintained an E2E test suite across web and mobile (**Playwright** and **Appium**), authoring 10+ PRs that reduced flaky monitoring failures and improved CI reliability across 3 frontend repositories

Drove quality signal initiatives in growth experiments and identity modules — **Datadog** telemetry, **Chromatic** visual regression, test script for assigning **Optimizely** flag to user in test, SEO sitemap verification and prototype debug toolings as **Chrome Extension** and embedded-tools in mobile application for dogfooding — closing gaps with no prior automated coverage

Coordinated on-time release sign-offs across Growth, Web Platform, and Identity teams including cross-timezone alignment with US engineers; supported investigation with **Amplitude** and leveraged AI toolings to accelerate test generation
Selected as fellowship during Cohort 2 as contributor
Maintained and implemented features in IPFS web console and libp2p
Drived initiate on Bluesky backup web application using Storacha

Built a Ethereum staking platform using **Wagmi** for on-chain interactions — covering wallet connection, token staking, and reward tracking — from smart contract integration through to **React** frontend with **Hotjar** analytics

Implemented **Playwright** test suite covering the full crypto wallet flow from wallet extension through on-chain smart contract interaction, establishing automated coverage for a notoriously difficult-to-test surface
Configured **GitHub Actions** pipelines for automated build and deployment in **Firebase**, reducing manual release steps and enabling faster iteration across the team

workExperiences.companyDescription: Thailand-based healthtech company building AI-powered hospital information systems
details: Developed full-stack modules across **React** frontend, **Nest.js** backend, and **SQL Database** for a healthcare software platform used in hospital workflows
Integrated hospital 3rd-party services including external **FHIR APIs** and **OAuth-based SSO**, enabling secure cross-system identity and data exchange in a regulated healthcare environment

Conducted performance testing with **k6**, **InfluxDB** and **Grafana** that surfaced performance bottlenecks in production-bound services, driving targeted fixes that improved reliability before release
Built **DeFi** lending and staking interfaces using **Web3.js**, integrating directly with **Ethereum smart contracts** to handle on-chain transactions from the browser
Maintained and implemented monitoring system for DeFi products including **cron-job** for batch processing, **Telegram** bots and web dashboard

Built venture prototypes across multiple products — including merchant landing page for delivery app and wholesale e-commerce platform with **Next.js** frontend and **Google Analytics** and **LINE chatbot** — as part of a fast-moving venture builder environment

educations.head: B.Eng. Computer Engineering
educations.details: King Mongkut's Institute of Technology Ladkrabang, 2018–2021

openSourceContributions.details: Implemented base components, fixed incorrect UI display and refactored models to components
Implemented improvement features e.g. CAR file import, QR Modal for sharing and UX fixes

Reading books in various topics e.g. non-fiction, literature and philosophy
